title: Best Oasis Weekly Recycling Market Report, 04 July 2025
section_path: Best Oasis Weekly Recycling Market Report, 04 July 2025
section_path_text: Best Oasis Weekly Recycling Market Report, 04 July 2025
summary:
Main
in Weekly Demolition Reports 05/07/2025
Ship recycling markets across South Asia and Türkiye remain under sustained pressure, with sentiment weak and no improvement in activity levels. Source: Best Oasis Limited

Linked asset: 2025-07-05_Weekly-Ship-Recycling-Report-27-June-04-July-2025_compressed.pdf
Source asset: reports/hellenic/demolition/pdfs/2025-07-05_Weekly-Ship-Recycling-Report-27-June-04-July-2025_compressed.pdf

[Page 1]
Weekly Ship Recycling Report
27 June - 04 July 2025
Visit : www.best-oasis.com Head Office: 3201, Saba Tower 1, Cluster E, Jumeirah Lake Towers, Dubai, U.A.E
Email: bol@bol.ae Contact: +971 4575 4667

[Page 2]
Highlights of the week
Ship recycling markets across South Asia and Türkiye remain under sustained pressure, with sentiment weak and no improvement in activity levels. In India,
sluggish demand persists as cheaper local steel continues to limit market momentum, while monsoon conditions are disrupting yard operations and adding
to the challenges faced by recyclers.
